knowledge_base_metadata.knowledge_base_scope: Typecode decoding, electrical ratings, and configuration structure for iC2-Micro frequency converters
knowledge_base_metadata.coverage_summary: Selection guide provides ordering model code structure, electrical ratings, enclosure sizes, and feature descriptions. No design/operating guide detected in uploaded documents.

source_registry.scope_summary: Product overview, ordering model code, electrical data, dimensions, accessories
notes_relevant_to_decoding_or_datasheet_: Ordering model code diagram defines typecode structure
EMC category codes F0, F2, F4 defined
Brake chopper options defined as +ACXX and +ACBC

typecode_structure.explanation: Defines phase configuration (single or three phase)
Defines output current rating of the drive
Defines presence of integrated brake chopper

notes: The value is measured at 100% rated torque-producing current and 90% rated motor stator frequency according to IEC 61800-9-2 and EN 50598-2.
The value is measured at 100% rated torque-producing current and 90% rated motor stator frequency according to IEC 61800-9-2 and EN 50598-2.
The value is measured at 100% rated torque-producing current and 90% rated motor stator frequency according to IEC 61800-9-2 and EN 50598-2.
The value is measured at 100% rated torque-producing current and 90% rated motor stator frequency according to IEC 61800-9-2 and EN 50598-2.

mapping_rules.mapping_logic_from_documents: Map code 01 to 100-120 V AC, 02 to 200-240 V AC, 04 to 380-480 V AC
Map 1N to single phase and 3N to three phase
Numeric value in code corresponds directly to output current in amperes (e.g., 02A2 = 2.2 A, 15A2 = 15.2 A)
Map F0 to C1, F2 to C2, F4 to C4 EMC category
Map E20 to IP20/Open Type enclosure
Map +ACXX to no brake chopper and +ACBC to integrated brake chopper

constraints.exact_rule: Built-in brake chopper is only applicable to drives in the power range of 3 x 380-480 V 2.2 kW and above, and 3 x 200-240 V 1.5 kW and above
No BR terminals for 1 x 100-120 V drives, 1 x 200-240 V drives, 3 x 380-480 V 0.37-1.5 kW and 3 x 200-240 V 0.37-0.75 kW drives
Digital I/O mode (PNP=Source, NPN=Sink) selectable via parameter P9.4.1.1
Use switch S640 to enable termination on the RS485 port (terminals 68 and 69)

family_detection_rules: If typecode starts with iC2 then product_family = iC2-Micro
fallback_rules: If value not found in typecode, lookup in technical tables
If still not found, return NOT FOUND IN THE UPLOADED DOCUMENTS
